title: bidens sweetiana
intro: Bidens sweetiana, also known as Sweet Bidens or Sweet Bident, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Bidens sweetiana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for various health ailments.
